CustomPermission.description: Grants access to the MetaMapper application. Checked by ToolingApiHealthCheck.verify() before any Tooling API callout - users without this permission receive PERMISSION_SET_MISSING and cannot trigger Named Credential network calls. Included in the MetaMapper_Admin permission set. Do not assign directly; assign the MetaMapper_Admin permission set instead.
CustomPermission.label: MetaMapper Application Access
